title: selaginella muelleri
intro: Selaginella muelleri, also known as the 'Spikemoss', is a type of small, evergreen plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Selaginella muelleri include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. Selaginella muelleri can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, tincture, and infusion, making it easily accessible for those looking to harness its medicinal properties.
